Visited Towns

Track French communes visited in the field

Field-collected via QField, badges and maps generated with Python.

Progress

Code 
kpi_html = f"""
<div class="kpi-hero">
  <div class="kpi-card kpi-blue">
    <span class="kpi-value">{n_visited:,} / {total:,}</span>
    <span class="kpi-label">Communes visited — {pct}%</span>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="kpi-row">
  <div class="kpi-card kpi-green">
    <div class="kpi-icon">👥</div>
    <span class="kpi-value">{pop_visited:,}</span>
    <span class="kpi-label">Population covered</span>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card kpi-purple">
    <div class="kpi-icon">📐</div>
    <span class="kpi-value">{area_visited:,.0f} km²</span>
    <span class="kpi-label">Area covered</span>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card kpi-gold">
    <div class="kpi-icon">🗺️</div>
    <span class="kpi-value">{n_departments}</span>
    <span class="kpi-label">Departments visited</span>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card kpi-red">
    <div class="kpi-icon">📍</div>
    <span class="kpi-value">{n_regions}</span>
    <span class="kpi-label">Regions visited</span>
  </div>
</div>
"""
display(HTML(kpi_html))
33 / 34,969 Communes visited — 0.09%
👥
196,677 Population covered
📐

🗺️

Map

Code 
if n_visited > 0:
    map_center = [visited["latitude"].mean(), visited["longitude"].mean()]
else:
    map_center = [46.6, 2.4]

m = folium.Map(location=map_center, zoom_start=6, tiles="OpenStreetMap")

D = 5  # coordinate decimal places

GA_CALLBACK = """\
function (row) {
    var marker = L.circleMarker([row[0], row[1]], {radius: 5, color: '%s', fill: true, fillOpacity: 0.7, weight: 0});
    marker.bindPopup('<b>' + row[2] + '</b><br>Population: ' + (row[3] ? row[3].toLocaleString() : 'N/A'));
    return marker;
}
"""

# Unvisited communes — clustered red dots with name + population popup
unvisited_data = [
    [round(r["latitude"], D), round(r["longitude"], D),
     r["name"], r["population"] or 0]
    for r in unvisited.iter_rows(named=True)
]
uc = FastMarkerCluster(
    data=unvisited_data,
    callback=GA_CALLBACK % "#e74c3c",
    name="Unvisited communes",
)
uc.add_to(m)

# Visited communes — clustered green dots
visited_data = [
    [round(r["latitude"], D), round(r["longitude"], D),
     r["name"], r["population"] or 0]
    for r in visited.iter_rows(named=True)
]
vc = FastMarkerCluster(
    data=visited_data,
    callback=GA_CALLBACK % "green",
    name="Visited communes",
)
vc.add_to(m)

# Visited (details) — rich popups with photos, YouTube, Medium
cluster = MarkerCluster(name="Visited (details)").add_to(m)

for row in visited.iter_rows(named=True):
    popup_html = f"""
    <div style="min-width:220px">
      <b>{row['name']}</b><br>
      {row['department_name']} — <em>{row['visit_date']}</em><br>
      Population: {row['population']:,}
    """
    if row["photo_thumbnail_url"]:
        popup_html += f'<br><img src="{row["photo_thumbnail_url"]}" width="200" style="margin-top:6px;border-radius:4px">'
    if row["youtube_url"]:
        popup_html += f'<br><a href="{row["youtube_url"]}" target="_blank">▶ YouTube</a>'
    if row["medium_url"]:
        popup_html += f'<br><a href="{row["medium_url"]}" target="_blank">📝 Medium</a>'
    popup_html += "</div>"
    folium.CircleMarker(
        location=[round(row["latitude"], D), round(row["longitude"], D)],
        radius=8,
        color="green",
        fill=True,
        fill_opacity=0.8,
        popup=folium.Popup(popup_html, max_width=300),
        tooltip=row["name"],
    ).add_to(cluster)

folium.TileLayer(
    tiles="https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}",
    attr="Esri",
    name="Satellite",
    show=False,
).add_to(m)

Fullscreen().add_to(m)
folium.LayerControl().add_to(m)
display(m)
Make this Notebook Trusted to load map: File -> Trust Notebook

Badges

Code 
if len(badges) > 0:
    badge_cards = "".join(
        f'<div class="badge-card"><div class="badge-icon">{icon}</div>'
        f'<div class="badge-label">{label}</div>'
        f'<div class="badge-detail">{detail}</div></div>'
        for label, icon, detail in badges
    )
    display(HTML(f'<div class="badge-row">{badge_cards}</div>'))
else:
    display(HTML("<p>No badges earned yet. Start visiting communes!</p>"))

🏅 Badge details
Badge Criteria
🥉 10 communes Visit at least 10 communes
🥈 100 communes Visit at least 100 communes
🥇 1 000 communes Visit at least 1 000 communes
🏆 10 000 communes Visit at least 10 000 communes
📌 Full department Visit every commune in a department
📍 Full region Visit every commune in a region
🗺️ Explorer Visit 5 / 10 / 20 departments
🏔️ Mountain Visit a mountain commune (altitude > 800m)
🏝️ Island Visit an island commune
👥 Population Visit communes totalling 100k / 1M / 10M inhabitants
🌍 Overseas Visit an overseas commune (COM)
🗼 Paris Visit Paris

Department stats

Code 
from great_tables import GT

dept_stats = (
    visited.group_by("department_code", "department_name", "region_name")
    .agg(pl.len().alias("visited_communes"))
    .join(
        df.group_by("department_code")
        .agg(pl.len().alias("total_communes")),
        on="department_code",
    )
    .with_columns(
        (pl.col("visited_communes") / pl.col("total_communes") * 100)
        .round(1)
        .alias("pct_visited")
    )
    .sort("pct_visited", descending=True)
)

GT(dept_stats)
department_code department_name region_name visited_communes total_communes pct_visited
85 Vendée Pays de la Loire 27 253 10.7
09 Ariège Occitanie 4 325 1.2
56 Morbihan Bretagne 1 249 0.4
22 Côtes-d'Armor Bretagne 1 344 0.3

Visited communes

Code 
import itables
from itables import show

vis_display = visited.select(
    "name", "department_name", "region_name", "visit_date",
    "population", "area_km2", "is_mountain", "is_island_commune",
).sort("visit_date")

itables.options.warn_on_undocumented_option = False
show(
    vis_display.to_pandas(),
    caption="All visited communes — search, sort, paginate",
    maxBytes="0",
    layout={"bottomEnd": "paging", "bottomStart": "info", "topEnd": "search", "topStart": "pageLength"},
)
Loading ITables v2.7.3 from the internet... (need help?)
